entities.name: CHILO PARTELLUS
entities.description: Spotted stem borer, a major pest affecting maize and sorghum production in Asia and Africa

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A major coarse cereal crop affected by Chilo partellus

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A major coarse cereal crop affected by Chilo partellus

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: Region where maize and sorghum are grown and affected by Chilo partellus

entities.description: Region where maize and sorghum are grown and affected by Chilo partellus

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of cultivated germplasm to withstand Chilo partellus infestation

entities.description: Chemical agents used for the control of Chilo partellus

entities.name: DETOXIFICATION MECHANISMS
entities.description: Biological processes used by Chilo partellus to neutralize the effects of insecticides

entities.name: WHOLE GENOME SEQUENCING
entities.description: Technique used to determine the complete DNA sequence of Chilo partellus

entities.name: ILLUMINA HISEQ 2500
entities.description: The specific sequencing platform used to analyze larval samples of Chilo partellus

entities.name: CYP450S
entities.description: Cytochrome P450 genes encoding metabolic detoxification enzymes

entities.name: GSTS
entities.description: Glutathione S-transferases genes encoding metabolic detoxification enzymes

entities.name: XENOBIOTIC METABOLISM
entities.description: The metabolic process of breaking down foreign chemical substances in insects

entities.description: Genes regulating biological rhythms found in the Chilo partellus genome

entities.name: OLFACTORY RECEPTOR GENES
entities.description: Genes that mediate chemical cues found in the Chilo partellus genome

entities.name: ACHE
entities.description: Acetylcholinesterase receptors that serve as targets for insecticide action

entities.name: GABA
entities.description: Gamma-aminobutyric acid receptors that serve as targets for insecticide action

entities.name: NACHR
entities.description: Nicotinic acetylcholine receptors that serve as targets for insecticide action

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE CROP PRODUCTION
entities.description: The goal of maintaining agricultural productivity through effective pest control
